caption: A man is seen in a studio setting, dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He wears a grey, vertically spiked wig, glasses, and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, with a background filled with framed photos and clothing displays. To his left and right, logos for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" are visible on the screen. In the sequence, the man begins by looking forward and speaking. He then lifts his left hand toward his face and touches his temple. He continues speaking, gesturing with his hand, and eventually settles back into a neutral posture while looking slightly to the side. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene, and the background elements, including the framed images and a "LEE" brand sign, stay stationary.
